title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Sanji, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #13, Franky, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 4–7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's got it right this time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: we aren't playing pirates like kids here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll wait for him in silence!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We have a magnificent ship, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no matter how they treat me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have 100 patterns to counter them!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And we'll live happily ever after...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Bro, we wish you good health!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ever since Sanji told us the story,
